name: Contemporary Non-Binary Narrator
voice_prompt: Perfect audio quality. Narrator with an androgynous voice—not artificially pitched, just naturally in the middle range where gender isn't obvious. American, urban, millennial/Gen-Z sensibility. Warm and slightly sardonic. Reads with emotional intelligence and dry wit. Pacing varies naturally with content. Comfortable with vulnerability and humor in the same paragraph.
notes: The voice should feel authentic to contemporary queer/millennial sensibility without being a stereotype. Think: someone you'd meet at a Brooklyn reading, not a character. Emotional range matters more than vocal range.
